query: Terrion Arnold Detroit Lions Commissioner's Exempt List released waived NFL transaction status July 2026
answer:
Research complete. Here are the key findings on Terrion Arnold's transaction status:

**Bottom line:** Arnold was **waived by the Detroit Lions on June 29, 2026** and **cleared waivers on July 6, 2026**, becoming an unrestricted free agent. He was **NOT placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List** — the Lions deliberately chose to release him outright rather than use that mechanism.

**Timeline:**
- **Feb 4, 2026** — Armed robbery/kidnapping in Tampa (three victims beaten/pistol-whipped)
- **June 24, 2026** — Arnold arrested for allegedly orchestrating the plot
- **~June 25, 2026** — Charged with 8 felonies (4 armed robbery, 4 kidnapping; each up to life)
- **June 29, 2026** — Judge granted release on $1M bond; hours later, Lions waived him
- **July 6, 2026** — Cleared waivers unclaimed → free agent
- **Post-waiver** — Drew interest from ~4 teams (Texans, Colts, Jets, Seahawks); judge denied state's GPS ankle monitor request

As of the research date (July 13, 2026), he remains an **unsigned free agent awaiting trial**, with no source indicating a new team signing.

sources.snippet: Arnold cleared waivers Monday, making him a free agent. He was released by the Lions on June 29 after his arrest; posted a $1 million bond.

sources.title: Lions' decision to release Terrion Arnold has significant financial ramifications
Former Detroit Lions CB Terrion Arnold Scores Legal Victory Ahead of Trial
sources.snippet: A Florida judge denied the state's request to place him on a GPS ankle monitor while he awaits trial on felony kidnapping and robbery charges.

sources.title: State Attorney's Office to Charge NFL Player Terrion Arnold in Robbery and Kidnapping Case

key_facts: Terrion Arnold was WAIVED/released by the Detroit Lions on June 29, 2026.
Arnold CLEARED WAIVERS on July 6, 2026, becoming an unrestricted NFL free agent.
Arnold was NEVER placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List; the Lions parted ways with him outright instead of using that mechanism.
He was arrested June 24, 2026 by Tampa Police for a February 4, 2026 kidnapping/armed robbery in which three men were beaten and pistol-whipped.
He faces eight felony charges: four counts of armed robbery and four counts of kidnapping, each carrying up to life in prison.
A Florida judge granted his release on a $1 million bond on June 29, 2026 — the same day the Lions waived him, hours later.
Arnold was a 2024 first-round draft pick of the Lions, which is why he was subject to waivers (fewer than 4 accrued seasons).
After clearing waivers, he drew reported interest from multiple NFL teams including the Texans, Colts, Jets, and Seahawks.
A judge later denied the state's request to place Arnold on a GPS ankle monitor while awaiting trial.
As of the research date (July 13, 2026), Arnold remains an unsigned free agent awaiting trial; no source indicates a new team signing.
